sections.paragraph:
Original: גּוב גּב

Transliteration: gôb gôb

Phonetic: gobe

BDB Definition:

Gob = "cistern"
  1. a place which was the scene of two encounters between David's warriors and the Philistines (also 'Gezer')

Origin: from H1461

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
